title: Drag-and-Drop for 'Add Files'
excerpt:
Submitted on 2023-02-09T05:00:00Z (UTC) 
Please update the ‘Add Files’ functionality to accommodate drag-and-drop. In its current state, it is only possible to upload files by opening a mini window and selecting from dif…

posts.author: carla.machado (Carla )
posts.cookedHtml:
Submitted on 2023-02-09T05:00:00Z
Please update the ‘Add Files’ functionality to accommodate drag-and-drop. In its current state, it is only possible to upload files by opening a mini window and selecting from different folders.

posts.author: Kristinemd13 (Kristine Brooks)
posts.cookedHtml:
This was recently add to WorkForms but at the expense of being able to see the file names once the files are added

I reported it as a bug that was introduced when drag & drop was added but they have said the missing file names is expected behavior. All we see now are generic thumbnails without a preview. Not a good user experience.
